TimeEntry.Title: Disable Adobe auto update
TimeEntry.Notes: Pon's Adobe setting reverted. Likely caused by Adobe update that was automatically applied. Removed that setting and Pon will let us know if the issue returns.

TimeEntry.Title: Remote and NewStar are not working
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to Saule's laptop and found that she was on WiFi with no network link on ethernet. She confirmed that cable is plugged in. I scheduled with her to be onsite by noon today to check it out.

TimeEntry.Title: Liz PC is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Liz PC is not functional. Went onsite to swap her PC with a loaner. Fix network printing issue for Rick and Pon. Will bring Liz's PC back to office to confirm if it is an OS related or HW issue.

TimeEntry.Title: Liz PC is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Backed up data. Wipe PC with clean Win 11 install.

TimeEntry.Title: Liz PC is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Install ODBC driver for replacement PC. COnfirmed that it is communicating with the SQL server, but Newstar is still not running. Asked Parveen to open ticket with Newstar support.

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure Exchange Online Spam Policies are set to notify administrators
TimeEntry.Notes: Actions Taken:

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Retain spam in quarantine for 30 days
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Configured Spam Retention in Quarantine for 30 Days in Exchange Online

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Set action to take on phishing detection
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Configured Phishing Detection Action to Quarantine in Anti-Spam Policies

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Set action to take on high confidence spam detection
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Configured High Confidence Spam Detection Action to Quarantine in Anti-Spam Policies

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Sign out inactive users in SharePoint Online (90 pts each)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Enabled Idle Session Sign-Out Policy for SharePoint Online and On

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure mailbox auditing for all users is Enabled
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Corrected Mailbox Auditing for Non-Compliant Mailbox in Microsoft 365

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure MailTips are enabled for end users
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Enabled MailTips for All Users in Microsoft 365 Exchange Online

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure additional storage providers are restricted in Outlook on the web
TimeEntry.Notes:
Title:
Restricted Access to Additional Storage Providers in Outlook on th

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Enable Conditional Access policies to block legacy authentication
TimeEntry.Notes: Title: Preparation to Block Legacy Authentication via Conditional Access (Pending US Team Confirmation)

TimeEntry.Title: Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure user consent to apps accessing company data on their behalf is not allowed
TimeEntry.Notes: Title: Restrict User Consent to Verified Publishers Only (Pending US Team Confirmation)
